mapper.select: SELECT id , user_id as userId , title , body , created_at as createdAt FROM posts ORDER BY id::INTEGER ASC

SELECT id , user_id as userId , title , body ,created_at as createdAt FROM posts WHERE 1=1
AND id = #{id}
select count(*) as maxCount from posts
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( id, user_id, title, body, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(id AS INTEGER)),0) + 1 FROM posts), #{userId}, #{title}, #{body}, NOW() )
